tips: Use --help to see all available commands and options
Use --dry-run to preview changes without making them
Combine flags for efficiency: neorwc --model gemini --ctx 65536
Environment variables override CLI defaults for API keys
Use --config (-g) to open the interactive configuration TUI
Project-level settings are stored in docs/.neorwc
Press C-c to exit the TUI at any time
Arrow keys navigate menus, Enter selects, Esc goes back
Tab switches between input fields in API key screens
